metadata.description: DJ techno music library management — MCP tools for set building, audio analysis, and Yandex Music integration

plugins.name: dj-music
plugins.description: DJ techno music library management — 20 MCP dispatchers (6 entity CRUD + 3 provider + 2 compute + sync + 2 admin + 6 UI Prefab Apps) + 27 resources + 6 prompts + 6 handlers. FastMCP v3 bounded-contexts architecture.
